name: Mailchimp

composio_registry_match.name: Mailchimp
composio_registry_match.description: Mailchimp is an email marketing and automation platform providing campaign templates, audience segmentation, and performance analytics to drive engagement and conversions

description: An all-in-one marketing platform providing APIs for email marketing campaigns, transactional messaging, and e-commerce stack integration.
notes: Mailchimp Marketing API supports both OAuth2 and API Key authentication. Open Commerce utilizes GraphQL.
